codes.summary: Attendance query has an invalid from/to date range
codes.developerAction: Use inclusive YYYY-MM-DD dates with from on or before to
Set X-Company-Id or select a company in the gateway session
Re-authenticate and retry with a fresh JWT
Call through the Fluide API gateway with a valid session
Retry with backoff; contact support with timestamp and request details
Verify the employee or user ID exists in the tenant

codes.summary: Request body or query parameters failed validation
codes.developerAction: Fix the fields listed in `errors` and retry
